headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.stripe.com https://*.onrender.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
